text.p: Sir Iam writing to complain on the absence of some social and basic amenities such as road, electricity, etc Sir we have agreed as a community to write this because of it's impootance road play a vital role in a given community as regard to transportation of goods from our localities to the market. Along side electricity because most of our food stuff need to be preserved and we need to iron our cloth moreso, most of us have some machine that need electricity to function not only that we will like you to make pipe borne water available to our community to make our domestic chors or work easier.
Sir I know you have tried so well for the community and I believe you can do more. I believe with all these things listed above our community will be better for all.
